scripts.dev:worker: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- npm --prefix worker run dev
scripts.dev:all: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- concurrently "npm run dev" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.ai:serve:local: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- supabase functions serve ai-chat --no-verify-jwt
scripts.build: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- npm run build:production
scripts.build:production: tsc -b && FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.prod.template" -- vite build && node scripts/verify-sqlite-wasm-build.js
scripts.build:staging: tsc -b && FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.staging.template" -- vite build && node scripts/verify-sqlite-wasm-build.js
scripts.build:preview-local: tsc -b && FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- tsx scripts/build-preview-local.ts
scripts.link:local: yalc link @rhizome/core oosync && cd worker && yalc link oosync
scripts.unlink:local: yalc remove --all && npm install && cd worker && yalc remove --all && npm install
scripts.prep-for-ci-oosync: npm update oosync --package-lock-only && npm update oosync --package-lock-only --prefix worker && echo '✅ Lockfile oosync entry updated for CI. Local yalc links preserved!'
scripts.prep-for-ci-rhizome: npm update @rhizome/core --package-lock-only && echo '✅ Lockfile @rhizome/core entry updated for CI. Local yalc links preserved!'
scripts.lint: biome lint src e2e tests worker
scripts.format: biome format --write src e2e tests worker
scripts.format:check: biome format src e2e tests worker
scripts.check: biome check src e2e tests worker
scripts.fix: biome check --write src e2e tests worker
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit && tsc -p tests/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p e2e/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npm --prefix worker exec -- tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.db:local:reset: npm run db:local:auth:clear && FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- playwright clear-cache && RESET_DB=true FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- playwright test --reporter=list e2e/setup/auth.setup.ts --project=setup && npm run db:local:seed
scripts.db:dump-migration: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- npx supabase db dump --local --schema public -f supabase/migrations/20241101000000_initial_schema.sql
scripts.db:dump-seed: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- npx supabase db dump --local --data-only --schema public -f supabase/seed.sql
scripts.db:remote:backup: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.prod.template" -- node scripts/run-rhizome-db-remote-backup.mjs --schema public --schema auth
scripts.db:remote:backup:all: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.prod.template" -- node scripts/run-rhizome-db-remote-backup.mjs --schema public --schema cubefsrs --schema auth
scripts.db:staging:schema:push: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.staging.template" -- node scripts/run-supabase-schema-push.mjs --env staging
scripts.db:production:schema:push: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.prod.template" -- node scripts/run-supabase-schema-push.mjs --env production
scripts.db:remote:apply-top500: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.prod.template" -- supabase db execute --linked --file supabase/seeds/rsTop500.sql
scripts.test:unit: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- vitest run tests/ src/
scripts.test:e2e:both:ci: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- playwright test --project=chromium-auth --project=chromium --project='Mobile Chrome'
scripts.test:e2e:chromium:mobile: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- playwright test --project='Mobile Chrome' --reporter=list
scripts.test:e2e:chromium:both: FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- playwright test --project=chromium-auth --project=chromium --project='Mobile Chrome' --reporter=list
scripts.test:e2e:chromium:both:html: mkdir -p ./logs && FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- playwright test --project=chromium-auth --project=chromium --project='Mobile Chrome' --reporter=list,html
scripts.test:e2e:chromium:all:html: mkdir -p ./logs && FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.local.template" -- playwright test --project=chromium-auth  --project=chromium-pwa-offline --project=chromium --project='Mobile Chrome' --reporter=list,html
scripts.audit:summary: npm audit || echo '⚠️  Known dev-only vulnerabilities (esbuild, valibot, lodash.template) - see SECURITY.md'
scripts.r2:local:list: cd worker && sqlite3 -header -column "$(find .wrangler/state/v3/r2/miniflare-R2BucketObject -name '*.sqlite' | head -n 1)" "select key, size, datetime(uploaded/1000,'unixepoch') as uploaded_utc from _mf_objects order by uploaded desc;"
scripts.r2:local:list:notes: cd worker && sqlite3 -header -column "$(find .wrangler/state/v3/r2/miniflare-R2BucketObject -name '*.sqlite' | head -n 1)" "select key, size, datetime(uploaded/1000,'unixepoch') as uploaded_utc from _mf_objects where key like '%/notes/%' order by uploaded desc;"
scripts.r2:local:list:audio: cd worker && sqlite3 -header -column "$(find .wrangler/state/v3/r2/miniflare-R2BucketObject -name '*.sqlite' | head -n 1)" "select key, size, datetime(uploaded/1000,'unixepoch') as uploaded_utc from _mf_objects where key like '%/audio/%' order by uploaded desc;"
scripts.r2:local:head: sh -c 'cd worker && test -n "$1" || { echo "Usage: npm run r2:local:head -- <key>"; exit 1; }; npx wrangler r2 object get tunetrees-vault-preview/"$1" --local --pipe | wc -c' --
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist node_modules .vite .cache logs && cd worker && rm -rf dist node_modules .vite .cache logs
scripts.sonar:scan: branch=$(git branch --show-current) && FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.sonar.template" -- npx @sonar/scan -Dsonar.sources=src,e2e,tests,worker -Dsonar.branch.name="$branch"
scripts.sonar:scan:pr: branch=$(git branch --show-current) && pr=$(node scripts/get-open-pr.js number) && base=$(node scripts/get-open-pr.js base) && FORCE_COLOR=1 op run --env-file=".env.sonar.template" -- npx @sonar/scan -Dsonar.sources=src,e2e,tests,worker -Dsonar.pullrequest.key="$pr" -Dsonar.pullrequest.branch="$branch" -Dsonar.pullrequest.base="$base"
scripts.sonar:wait: branch=$(git branch --show-current) && SONAR_BRANCH="$branch" op run --env-file=".env.sonar.template" -- node scripts/wait-for-sonar-analysis.js
scripts.sonar:issues: branch=$(git branch --show-current) && SONAR_BRANCH="$branch" op run --env-file=".env.sonar.template" -- node scripts/fetch-sonar-issues.js
scripts.sonar:issues:branch: branch=$(git branch --show-current) && SONAR_BRANCH="$branch" op run --env-file=".env.sonar.template" -- node scripts/fetch-sonar-issues.js
scripts.sonar:issues:pr: pr=$(node scripts/get-open-pr.js number) && SONAR_PULL_REQUEST="$pr" op run --env-file=".env.sonar.template" -- node scripts/fetch-sonar-issues.js
scripts.sonar:scan-and-fetch: npm run sonar:scan && npm run sonar:wait && npm run sonar:issues
scripts.sonar:scan-and-fetch:pr: npm run sonar:scan:pr && npm run sonar:wait && npm run sonar:issues:pr
